    Index

    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    U

    UNDERCOOKED - Enum constant in enum class RestaurantGame.Patty.CookingState
     
    undoBurger() - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantController
    Calls undoBurger() on model
    undoBurger() - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantModel
    Removes last topping added to the burger.
    Unit_Tests - package Unit_Tests
     
    update(Observable, Object) - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantGUIView
    Is able to update the current customer and tasks that are being looked at, as well as the basket, burger, and oven and end of day screen.
    updateBasketGUI() - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantGUIView
    Updates the basket's GUI so that when a button representing a topping is clicked, that topping is removed from the basket.
    updateBurgerGUI() - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantGUIView
    Updates the burger GUI to display all the Toppings currently on it.
    updateCustomerQueue() - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantModel
    Sets currCustomer to next customer.
    updateOvenGUI() - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantGUIView
    Makes it so that when a Patty is added or removed from the oven, it's GUI updates.
    updateState() - Method in class RestaurantGame.Patty
    Updates the Patty's cooking state and image depending on how long it has been cooked.
    updateTaskList(int, Customer) - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantController
    Updates taskList in model using updateTaskList and the customerInt and customer
    updateTaskList(int, Customer) - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantModel
    Updates the currTaskList that corresponds with customer's number to that customer's order.
    updateTicketGui(VBox) - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantGUIView
    Updates Ticket's GUI when one is selected.
    URGENT - Enum constant in enum class RestaurantGame.KnownCustomer.Personality
